## News and changes

### Version 0.1.3
* Supported running selected records only, if the corresponding rows are selected.
* Support for changes in `'RCarb'` (v0.1.8) that will speed up the start of the app.
* Add better error catching to avoid the app freezes. 

### Version 0.1.2
* Fix minor issue related to a more recent version of `'shiny'` that prevented 
the app from starting

### Version 0.1.1

* Support for 'RCarb' 0.1.3 added

### Version 0.1.0

* Initial version
